title: Toddler Toilet Seat Potty Training, Potty Training Toilet Seat with Step Anti Splash Soft Cushion Handle and Foldable for Kids Boys Child Toilet Training in Bathroom Grey and White
features: COMPATIBLE WITH MOST TOILETS - This kid’s training toilet seat with steps fits any standard toilet seat. Our toddler toilet seat with a step stool is ideal for the elongated toilet. Potty seat with ladder suitable for V-shaped, U-shaped, and O-shaped toilets.

STURDY CONSTRUCTION - Toddler toilet seat for potty training made of non-toxic, environmentally friendly, and safe PP material. Our potty training seats with steps is strong enough to hold your baby as they climb up and down. This kids toilet seat with ladder can holds up to 70kgs/155lbs. A wider anti-slip ladder helps kids turn confidently. Step stool for potty training is wear-resistant and can effectively serve your baby for years.

FOLDABLE AND ADJUSTABLE - Our toddler toilet seat and step is foldable for convenient storage when it's not in use. Additionally, this kids toilet seat for potty training is height adjustable for compatibility with most toilets. You can adjust the height to meet your kids’ needs as they grow.

EASY TO ASSEMBLE AND USE - With a toilet training seat, enjoy the unprecedented fun of assembling it by yourself. This Potty training toilet seat with steps comes with installation guidelines to help you with installation. It takes you 5-10 minutes to assemble this toddler potty step stool.

SAFE AND TODDLER-FRIENDLY - Training potty for toddlers designed with anti-slip pads and a ladder to prevent the seat from shifting. Training toilet seat for kids has a soft cushion padding and splash guard. Designed with handles to assist the baby with climbing. High-back to protect your baby’s spine. Trustworthy for every parent.
description: Product Description Glenmore Potty Training Seat with Step Ladder - Make Toilet Training Fun Tired of cleaning your baby’s potty now and then after every use? Does your baby find it difficult and scary to use the adult toilet? Looking for the best way to turn your standard bathroom into a kids-friendly toilet? Well, We have designed the perfect choice potty trainer seat Detachable thick, soft cushion Padded with waterproof, removable, and washable cushion to add luxury. Non-slip stability Adjust the height and the footrest to meet your kids’ demands for a better experience. Foldable to save space Designed with every kid in mind, this potty seat trainer is foldable, adjustable. Hesitant Why You Need This Baby Potty Training Stool? Here are more reasons Training toilet seat for toddlers offers excellent comfort and confidence to your baby. Easy installation in just a few steps Make Potty Training Successful with Glenmore Toilet Training Seat with Ladder! REMINDER: Please Note That Our Children's Step Toilet is Not Suitable for Square Toilets. There May Be 1-2cm Error in the Manual Measurement of Ladder Child Toilet. There May Be Slight Chromatic Aberration Due to Different Lighting Conditions. Type Toddler Step Stools Material PP + TPR + Sponge + PVC Suitable Range 1-7 years boys and girls Colour Grey/White Max Load of Footrest 70KG/155lb Compatibility Suitable for V-shaped, U-shaped, and O-shaped toilets Package Contents 1 x Baby Potty Training Chair
